bg.$description: — morning-leaf pale green; the hue reads as fresh air and growing things without triggering "dark mode plant" associations

primary.$description: Forest green  — readable on light ground, references deep canopy rather than poison or warning

accent.$description: — solar gold; warm harvest light, the sun making things grow

spring.$description: Motion v12 two-parameter spring (bounce/visualDuration) or v11 legacy (stiffness/damping/mass).

base.$description: Base grid unit (all spacing is a multiple of this).
